_comment: Drives `vexpo asc privacy lint`. The dashboard form at App Store Connect is the source of truth for submission. This file keeps a versioned, reviewable copy next to the code. Default state declares three categories: CONTACT_INFO for the sign-in email, IDENTIFIERS for the opaque user id, and DIAGNOSTICS for crash and performance data. Drop the DIAGNOSTICS entry if your build ships no analytics. Tighten or expand to match your app.
